svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 54px; margin-left: 40px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 35px; font-family: 'Amazon Ember'; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
